title: The RealReal Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2022 Results
text: The RealReal Q4 2022 and full year 2022 results: Q4 GMV reached $493 million, up 13% year-over-year. Total Q4 revenue was $160 million, a 10% increase from Q4 2021. Q4 net loss improved to $39 million versus $52 million in prior year. Active buyers grew 25% to 998,000 trailing 12-month buyers. Orders increased 15% to 993,000. Average order value declined 2% to $496. Repeat buyer GMV represented 84% of total. Q4 adjusted EBITDA was $(20.2) million, or (12.6)% of revenue, compared to $(26.9) million or (18.5)% in Q4 2021. Full year 2022 GMV increased 23% to $1.8 billion. Full year 2022 total revenue rose 29% to $603 million. Full year 2022 net loss improved to $196 million from $236 million in 2021. Cash and cash equivalents: $294 million at year-end. Net inventory decreased $28 million year-over-year. Full year adjusted EBITDA: $(112.4) million or (18.6)% of revenue versus $(126.9) million or (27.1)% in 2021. Gross margin improved by 490 basis points in Q4 2022 compared to Q4 2021, driven by shrinking unprofitable direct business and growing profitable consignment business.
